html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be thrown into the sea to create a pair of connected Whirlportals. Boats sailing close to them will be brought to the other entrance.”

-

The Bootleg Getaway is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be acquired upon the defeat of a Frostjaw. It creates a portal at sea to any other discovered location in the Ocean.

The Bootleg is an equippable item. To be thrown, the player must be on a Boat or Grass Raft. To create a portal, once the Bootleg is prompted to be tossed, the map opens and the player can select which other location in the Ocean they want the exit to be. The location can be anywhere the player has uncovered on the map, whether they've been there before or had it revealed by a Map Scroll.

The Bootleg is always thrown in the direction of the location desired to be the second exit. Therefore, if the boat the player is on is too close to land or another boat in that direction, the Bootleg simply lands there and can be picked back up.

Contents

  • 1 Whirlportal
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Whirlportal

“ An ocean portal that allows boats to travel long distances.”

-

The Whirlportal is created by the Bootleg Getaway. It stays open for 4 minutes (half of an in-game day). Boats or rafts that pass through are teleported to the other side of the portal. Depending on the speed of the boat, waves may be created. Players on boats that pass through have their Wetness increased by 20. It is a two-way portal; therefore, it can be made with the purpose of teleporting other players to the player with the Bootleg. It can also be used to go back and forth between the two locations as long as the portal is active.


Tips

  • The Whirlportal can be used to lead a Boat from other players to the current location, as long as the area of the other Boat has already been revealed on the map. For the exact position the other Boat can light a Flare or use a Moonlens.
  • Whirlportals can be created in areas of water that are too small to hold a boat. If either end of the Whirlportal is in such an area boats will not be able to cross through.

Trivia

  • The Bootleg Getaway was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow update.
  • On beta release prior to update 585956, Whirlportals only stayed open for 60 seconds.
  • Whirlportals were previously found in the Don't Starve Hamlet files long ago

Gallery

  • Thrown
  • Bootleg Getaway Concept Art from Scrappy Scavengers Annonce Rhymes with Play.

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Bootleg Getaway
Object Info
Perk
Creates a temporary Whirlportal at sea.
Equipable
1 use
10
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"bootleg"
“Somewhere out there, a pirate is missing their bootie.”
–Wilson
“Ugh, it smells like old feet!”
–Willow
“Is not Wolfgang's size.”
–Wolfgang
“It will just take me from one unpleasant place to another.”
–Wendy
“SCANNING FOR VIRUSES”
–WX-78
“As far as teleportation methods go, it's quite unrefined.”
–Wickerbottom
“How aboot we leg it out of here, eh?”
–Woodie
“Best not to think about where it's been.”
–Maxwell
“Retreat is the way öf cöwards!”
–Wigfrid
“Someone forgot their foot inside!”
–Webber
“Oh... oh my, was this someone's actual leg?”
–Warly
“Oh. Branch inside?”
–Wormwood
“Guess I'd better shake a leg. Ha!”
–Winona
“Hyuyu! Who cobbled this together?”
–Wortox
“Oooh, bones!”
–Wurt
“Sorry Woby, that bone isn't for you.”
–Walter
“Hmph. That's no proper spacial displacement device, just a cheap knockoff!”
–Wanda
“Can be thrown into the sea to create a pair of connected Whirlportals. Boats sailing close to them will be brought to the other entrance.”
-
The Bootleg Getaway is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be acquired upon the defeat of a Frostjaw. It creates a portal at sea to any other discovered location in the Ocean.
The Bootleg is an equippable item. To be thrown, the player must be on a Boat or Grass Raft. To create a portal, once the Bootleg is prompted to be tossed, the map opens and the player can select which other location in the Ocean they want the exit to be. The location can be anywhere the player has uncovered on the map, whether they've been there before or had it revealed by a Map Scroll.
The Bootleg is always thrown in the direction of the location desired to be the second exit. Therefore, if the boat the player is on is too close to land or another boat in that direction, the Bootleg simply lands there and can be picked back up.
Contents
1 Whirlportal
2 Tips
3 Trivia
4 Gallery
Whirlportal[edit | edit source]
Whirlportal
Object Info
Perk
Two-way portal at sea.
240 seconds
Miscellaneous
"oceanwhirlportal"
“I'll give it a whirl.”
–Wilson
“Er, can't we take the scenic route instead?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang does not run! He makes courageous escape!”
–Wolfgang
“It calls to me.”
–Wendy
“I HATE THIS I HATE THIS I HATE THIS”
–WX-78
“One typically avoids sailing into a whirlpool, but sense and reason seem to mean nothing in this place.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hold your breath, Lucy!”
–Woodie
“Is it safe? We should send Wilson in first.”
–Maxwell
“Oh, beautiful maelström. Intö thy hungry möuth we döth sail.”
–Wigfrid
“We love spinny boat rides!”
–Webber
“Someone is really stirring the soup.”
–Warly
“Spinny water!”
–Wormwood
“Alright, time to sink or swim!”
–Winona
“Oooh goodie! A watery vortex for little ol' Wortox!”
–Wortox
“Wheeeeeeee!!”
–Wurt
“I don't think my water safety badge prepared me for that.”
–Walter
“If it's the quickest way out of here, I suppose I can't be picky.”
–Wanda
“ An ocean portal that allows boats to travel long distances.”
-
The Whirlportal is created by the Bootleg Getaway. It stays open for 4 minutes (half of an in-game day). Boats or rafts that pass through are teleported to the other side of the portal. Whirlportals can be created in areas of water that are too small to hold a boat. If either end of the Whirlportal is in such an area boats will not be able to cross through.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Bootleg Getaway was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow update.
On beta release prior to update 585956, Whirlportals only stayed open for 60 seconds.
Whirlportals were previously found in the Don't Starve Hamlet files long ago

{{Scrapbook Info|Can be thrown into the sea to create a pair of connected Whirlportals. Boats sailing close to them will be brought to the other entrance.}}

The '''Bootleg Getaway''' is an Item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be acquired upon the defeat of a [[Frostjaw]]. It creates a portal at sea to any other discovered location in the [[Ocean]].

The Bootleg is an equippable item. To be thrown, the player must be on a [[Boat Kit|Boat]] or [[Grass Raft]]. To create a portal, once the Bootleg is prompted to be tossed, the map opens and the player can select which other location in the Ocean they want the exit to be. The location can be anywhere the player has uncovered on the map, whether they've been there before or had it revealed by a [[Map Scroll]].

The Bootleg is always thrown in the direction of the location desired to be the second exit. Therefore, if the boat the player is on is too close to land or another boat in that direction, the Bootleg simply lands there and can be picked back up.

The '''Whirlportal''' is created by the Bootleg Getaway. It stays open for 4 minutes (half of an in-game day). Boats or rafts that pass through are teleported to the other side of the portal. Depending on the speed of the boat, waves may be created. Players on boats that pass through have their [[Wetness]] increased by 20. It is a two-way portal; therefore, it can be made with the purpose of teleporting other players to the player with the Bootleg. It can also be used to go back and forth between the two locations as long as the portal is active.
{{clear}}


=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* The Whirlportal can be used to lead a [[Boat]] from other players to the current location, as long as the area of the other Boat has already been revealed on the map. For the exact position the other Boat can light a [[Flare]] or use a [[Moonlens]].
* Whirlportals can be created in areas of water that are too small to hold a boat. If either end of the Whirlportal is in such an area boats will not be able to cross through.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Bootleg Getaway was introduced in the ''[[Skill Spotlight Update#Wigfrid & Willow|Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow]]'' update.
* On beta release prior to update 585956, Whirlportals only stayed open for 60 seconds.
* Whirlportals were previously found in the Don't Starve Hamlet files long ago
